mapper.select: SELECT S.SSNT_YR, S.SSNT_STTS_CD, S.CUR_DT, S.SSNT_END_DT, S.REG_SSNT_BGNG_DT FROM SSNT S WHERE S.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}
SELECT ST.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, ST.W, ST.L, ST.T, ST.PCT, ST.STND_RNK FROM STND ST JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = ST.TM_ID WHERE ST.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} ORDER BY ST.PCT DESC, ST.W DESC
SELECT ST.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, ST.W, ST.L, ST.T, ST.PCT, ST.STND_RNK FROM STND ST JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = ST.TM_ID WHERE ST.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND ST.STND_RNK = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT B.PLR_ID, B.TM_ID, B.SSNT_YR, SUM(B.G) AS G, SUM(B.PA) AS PA, SUM(B.AB) AS AB, SUM(B.H) AS H, SUM(B.DOBL) AS DOBL, SUM(B.TRPL) AS TRPL, SUM(B.HR) AS HR, SUM(B.RBI) AS RBI, SUM(B.R) AS R, SUM(B.BB) AS BB, SUM(B.IBB) AS IBB, SUM(B.SO) AS SO, SUM(B.SB) AS SB, SUM(B.CS) AS CS, SUM(B.HBP) AS HBP, SUM(B.SAC) AS SAC, SUM(B.SF) AS SF, SUM(B.GIDP) AS GIDP, -- 타율 = H / AB CASE WHEN SUM(B.AB) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(B.H) / SUM(B.AB), 4) ELSE NULL END AS BA, -- 출루율 = (H + BB + HBP) / PA CASE WHEN SUM(B.PA) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(B.H) + SUM(B.BB) + SUM(B.HBP)) / SUM(B.PA), 4) ELSE NULL END AS OBP, -- 장타율 = (H + DOBL + 2*TRPL + 3*HR) / AB CASE WHEN SUM(B.AB) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(B.H) + SUM(B.DOBL) + 2 * SUM(B.TRPL) + 3 * SUM(B.HR)) / SUM(B.AB), 4) ELSE NULL END AS SLG FROM PLR_BATR_MON_REC B WHERE B.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} GROUP BY B.PLR_ID, B.TM_ID, B.SSNT_YR

SELECT P.PLR_ID, P.TM_ID, P.SSNT_YR, SUM(P.G) AS G, SUM(P.GS) AS GS, SUM(P.IP_OUT) AS IP_OUT, SUM(P.BF) AS BF, SUM(P.H) AS H, SUM(P.HR) AS HR, SUM(P.R) AS R, SUM(P.ER) AS ER, SUM(P.BB) AS BB, SUM(P.IBB) AS IBB, SUM(P.SO) AS SO, SUM(P.HBP) AS HBP, SUM(P.W) AS W, SUM(P.L) AS L, SUM(P.SV) AS SV, SUM(P.HLD) AS HLD, -- ERA = 9 * ER / IP (IP = IP_OUT / 3) CASE WHEN SUM(P.IP_OUT) > 0 THEN ROUND(9.0 * SUM(P.ER) / (SUM(P.IP_OUT) / 3.0), 2) ELSE NULL END AS ERA, -- WHIP = (BB + H) / IP CASE WHEN SUM(P.IP_OUT) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(P.BB) + SUM(P.H)) / (SUM(P.IP_OUT) / 3.0), 2) ELSE NULL END AS WHIP FROM PLR_PTCH_MON_REC P WHERE P.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} GROUP BY P.PLR_ID, P.TM_ID, P.SSNT_YR

SELECT R.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM, R.IP_OUT, R.ERA, R.W FROM PLR_PTCH_SSNT_REC R JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = R.TM_ID WHERE R.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND R.IP_OUT >= 120 AND R.ERA IS NOT NULL ORDER BY R.ERA ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT sub.PLR_ID, sub.PLR_NM, sub.TM_KR_NM, sub.POSN_CD, sub.PA, sub.OPS FROM ( SELECT R.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM, PP.POSN_CD, R.PA, ROUND( COALESCE(R.OBP, 0) + COALESCE(R.SLG, 0), 4 ) AS OPS, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY PP.POSN_CD ORDER BY (COALESCE(R.OBP, 0) + COALESCE(R.SLG, 0)) DESC ) AS RN FROM PLR_BATR_SSNT_REC R JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = R.TM_ID JOIN PLR_POSN PP ON PP.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID AND PP.POSN_CD BETWEEN '20' AND '28' WHERE R.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND R.PA >= 200 ) sub WHERE sub.RN = 1 ORDER BY sub.POSN_CD

SELECT R.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM, R.PA, R.HR, R.RBI, R.BA, R.OBP, R.SLG, ROUND(COALESCE(R.OBP, 0) + COALESCE(R.SLG, 0), 4) AS OPS FROM PLR_BATR_SSNT_REC R JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = R.TM_ID WHERE R.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND R.PA >= 400 ORDER BY (COALESCE(R.OBP, 0) + COALESCE(R.SLG, 0)) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT R.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM, R.IP_OUT, R.ERA, R.W, R.SO, R.WHIP FROM PLR_PTCH_SSNT_REC R JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = R.TM_ID WHERE R.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND R.IP_OUT >= 300 AND R.ERA IS NOT NULL ORDER BY R.ERA ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT ST.TM_ID, ST.STND_RNK, ST.W, ST.L, ST.PCT FROM STND ST WHERE ST.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} ORDER BY ST.STND_RNK
SELECT TM_ID, FAN_STSFCTN, OWN_STSFCTN FROM TM_MKT_SSNT WHERE SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}
SELECT TM_ID, TCKT_REV, BCST_REV, PLR_SAL_COST, CUR_CASH FROM TM_FNC_SSNT WHERE SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}
SELECT P.PLR_ID, P.PLR_OVRL_ABLT, P.PLR_POT_ABLT, P.PLR_STTS_CD FROM PLR P WHERE P.PLR_STTS_CD IN ('AT', 'INJ', 'FA')

SELECT PC.PLR_ID, PC.TM_ID, PC.FA_CNTRCT_BGNG_DT, PC.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM FROM PLR_TM_CNTRCT PC JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = PC.PLR_ID LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = PC.TM_ID WHERE PC.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT IS NOT NULL AND PC.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT <= #{ssntEndDt} AND P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'AT'
SELECT P.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, P.PLR_OVRL_ABLT, P.PLR_POT_ABLT FROM PLR P WHERE P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'FA' AND P.PLR_OVRL_ABLT <= 40 AND P.PLR_POT_ABLT <= 50
SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = 'USER_TM_ID'

SELECT R.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, R.PA, R.HR, R.RBI, R.BA, ROUND(COALESCE(R.OBP, 0) + COALESCE(R.SLG, 0), 4) AS OPS FROM PLR_BATR_SSNT_REC R JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID WHERE R.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND R.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND R.PA >= 100 ORDER BY (COALESCE(R.OBP, 0) + COALESCE(R.SLG, 0)) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT R.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, R.IP_OUT, R.ERA, R.W, R.SO FROM PLR_PTCH_SSNT_REC R JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID WHERE R.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND R.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND R.IP_OUT >= 60 AND R.ERA IS NOT NULL ORDER BY R.ERA ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT TCKT_REV, BCST_REV, PLR_SAL_COST, CUR_CASH FROM TM_FNC_SSNT WHERE TM_ID = #{tmId} AND SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SSNT_EVNT (SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, TM_ID, EVNT_TYPE_CD, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS) VALUES
(#{e.ssntYr}, #{e.evntDt}, #{e.tmId}, #{e.evntTypeCd}, #{e.evntTtlt}, #{e.evntCnts})
